productDisplayName: Asics Women Gel Kayano 17 White Silver Blue Shoe
description: A GIFT FOR LONG DISTANCE ROAD RUNNERS One of the highest structured running shoe structured for mild to severe pronators, the asics Gel Kayano 17 is a to-die-for running shoe ever created. Much better engineered than its predecessors and competitors, the asics Gel Kayano 17 running shoe has a patented Impact Guidance System (IGS) Line to provides direction and support when the foot hits the ground during each stride, allowing a more efficient transition from heelstrike to toe-off. And the more efficiently your transit betweenstrides, the more faster and smoother your rides will become with a better energy return. The IGS also ensures an efficient running gait, allowing you to run long distances without any sense of fatigue or stress. Ideal for heavy runners The best shoe ever manufactured for long distance road runners, the Asics Gel Kayano 17 has a Gel cushioning in the forefoot and rearfoot that is more durable than either foam or air midsoles. This Gel cushioning in these two impact-prone areas of the foot in varying densities ensures maximum shock absorption when running on hard road surfaces, protecting the foot from injuries. This Gel cushioning system makes the Kayano 17 an ideal running shoe for heavy runners and those who are prone to shin splints. Asymmetrical lacing for better comfort only high performance asics shoes like the Asics Gel Kayano 17 are employed with an asymmetrical lacing system, where only one side of the foot is laced up, leaving out he brow. With such a system in place, you can be rest assured that there is practically no irritation when the foot flexes, while the lacing system ensures a snug and decent Fit. Protective shield for the heel The Asics Gel Kayano 17 is engineered with high quality memory foam heel that plugs to your foot after a few runs, adding that extra heel support and ensuring a better fit. This also provides maximum protection against sprains and twisted ankles, making this a perfect running partner. To make this running shoe all the more safe and healthy, Asics has added to it a Comfort Dry Sockliner that regulates the micro climate within the shoe and keeps the foot dry and fresh even during long runs. Replete with cushioning and support for long distance runners, and completely engineered with advanced impact guide lines to enhance gait even when tired, there's nothing more to ask for with the Asics Gel Kayano 17. Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
